title: DAYTIME WINTER WARMING CENTER - 211info
text: CORVALLIS-BENTON PUBLIC LIBRARY DAYTIME WINTER WARMING CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a drop-in day space to go inside out of the cold to warm up temporarily throughout the winter season. Provides wifi, public bathrooms, and water refill station. Additional services may be offered. 645 NW Monroe Avenue Corvallis, OR 97330 Eligibility: Unrestricted. Pets allowed but must be kept in crates. Crates are available to borrow if needed. Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-7pm, Friday-Saturday 9am-6pm, Sunday 1pm-5pm Email (541) 766-6793 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 766-6793 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call ahead to confirm hours FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Benton County Services: Extreme Cold Warming Centers If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CORVALLIS-BENTON PUBLIC LIBRARY
